title: UK: ‘Islamic sect’ members arrested following allegations of sexual abuse and slavery
summary_full: Over 500 officers stormed an "Islamic sect" in Crewe, arresting 10 members, including their spiritual leader, for serious crimes like rape, sexual assault, and human trafficking.  The raid targeted the Ahmadi Religion of Peace and Light headquarters.  Police are investigating allegations of forced marriage and slavery reported by a former member.
